description: Use this API to specify the system diagram defaults for Voltage coloring and style, Out of Service coloring and style etc. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.0.0. setdiagresvrcs_2(setscope, usevolt, vlnwdt, vlnsty, vltval, vlnclrr, vlnclrg, vlnclrb, useoosclr, ooswdt, oossty, outclr, bndclr, unbndclr, brkopnclr, brkclsclr, usevoltlay, hideunbnd, fltbuswidth, fltbusstyle, fltbusclr)
python_syntax: setdiagresvrcs_2(setscope, usevolt, vlnwdt, vlnsty, vltval, vlnclrr, vlnclrg, vlnclrb, useoosclr, ooswdt, oossty, outclr, bndclr, unbndclr, brkopnclr, brkclsclr, usevoltlay, hideunbnd, fltbuswidth, fltbusstyle, fltbusclr)

parameters.name: setscope
parameters.description: Scope of the api. (input).

parameters.name: usevolt
parameters.description: Voltage level coloring. the element has only two possible values. 0 = false and 1 = true. (input).

parameters.name: vlnwdt
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying width of Diagram elements that fall in the appropriate voltage range. (input).

parameters.name: vlnsty
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying line style of diagram elements that fall in the appropriate voltage range. (input).

parameters.name: vltval
parameters.description: An array of 7 elements specifying voltage ranges used to assign annotation diagram. Base voltage values should be in ascending order. (input).

parameters.name: vlnclrr
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying the Red color component of diagram elements that fall in the appropriate voltage range, 0->255. (input).

parameters.name: vlnclrg
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying the Green color component of diagram elements that fall in the appropriate voltage range, 0->255. (input).

parameters.name: vlnclrb
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying the Blue color component of diagram elements that fall in the appropriate voltage range, 0->255. (input).

parameters.name: useoosclr
parameters.description: Out-of-service coloring. the element has only two possible values. 0 = false and 1 = true. (input).

parameters.name: ooswdt
parameters.description: Width of diagram items that are out of service. ooswdt line width >= 1. (input).

parameters.name: oossty
parameters.description: Line style of diagram items that are out of service. oossty line style. (input).

parameters.name: outclr
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying color of diagram items that are out of service. (input).

parameters.name: bndclr
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying bound item color. (input).

parameters.name: unbndclr
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying unbound item color. (input).

parameters.name: brkopnclr
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying open breaker/switch item color. (input).

parameters.name: brkclsclr
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying closed breaker/switch item color. (input).

parameters.name: usevoltlay
parameters.description: Assign items to layers based on base kv. (input).

parameters.name: hideunbnd
parameters.description: Not used. (input).

parameters.name: fltbuswidth
parameters.description: Line width applied to the faulted bus item. (input).

parameters.name: fltbusstyle
parameters.description: Line style applied to the faulted bus item. (input).

parameters.name: fltbusclr
parameters.description: An array of three elements specifying faulted bus item color. (input).

setscope.description: defaults for new diagrams and settings for the active diagram.
